name: TikToker

releases.author: ameyxd
releases.description:
## Changes

This release addresses all feedback from the Obsidian plugin review bot.

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed TypeScript type assertions and removed unnecessary `any` casts
- Added proper promise handling with `void` operator for async callbacks
- Updated deprecated `MarkdownRenderer.renderMarkdown` to `MarkdownRenderer.render` API
- Fixed unnecessary escape characters in regex patterns

### UI Improvements
- Converted all UI text to sentence case per Obsidian guidelines
- Replaced 87+ inline styles with CSS classes for better maintainability
- Improved consistency across modal dialogs and toast notifications

### Code Quality
- Removed unused variables and cleaned up dead code
- Better type safety throughout the codebase

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/tiktoker/` folder.
releases.name: v1.5.5 - Review Bot Fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release fixes critical UI bugs and improves file compatibility, bringing TikToker closer to approval for the official
  Obsidian Community Plugins directory.

  ## Bug Fixes

  ### Review Queue UI Restored
  - **Fixed:** Review Queue interface was completely broken - buttons, filters, and controls were misaligned and unstyled
  - **Now:** Clean, properly styled interface with all controls working as intended

  ### Transcription Modal Stays Visible
  - **Fixed:** Transcription progress modal would disappear when clicking anywhere outside it, with no way to get it back
  - **Now:** Clicking outside the modal minimizes it to the bottom-right corner instead of closing it
  - You can now track transcription progress without keeping the modal open
  - Click the minimized modal to expand it back when needed
  - Modal still auto-closes when transcription completes

  ## Improvements

  ### Obsidian Sync Compatibility
  - File names now work seamlessly with Obsidian Sync
  - Automatically removes problematic characters (pipe `|` and Windows reserved characters)
  - No more sync errors from TikTok note filenames

  ### Under the Hood
  - Improved performance and stability
  - Better compatibility with other plugins
  - Code improvements required for Community Plugin approval

  ## What's Next

  This release addresses all feedback from the Obsidian team's review of PR #7766. Once approved, TikToker will be available
  directly in Obsidian's Community Plugins browser for easy installation!

  ---

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features

### One-Click Script Installer

  - Automatic installation of transcription scripts from GitHub releases
  - Installation modal with visual progress tracking
  - Manual installation fallback with clear instructions and copy-to-clipboard path helper
  - First-run notice prompts new users to set up transcription (dismissible)

### Enhanced Script Detection

  - Scripts are now verified on every plugin load, not just initial setup
  - Existing script paths are validated to ensure they still exist
  - Auto-detection works for both fresh installs and existing configurations

### Improved Command Availability

  - Transcription commands now always appear in command palette
  - Helpful error messages guide users to install scripts if missing
  - No more confusion about "where did the transcribe command go?"

###  New Bulk Transcription Commands

  - Transcribe Recent TikTok Notes (7 days) - Process notes from the last week
  - Transcribe All Untranscribed TikTok Notes - Catch up on entire backlog
  - Progress tracking for batch operations

  #### Bug Fixes

  - Fixed crash when saving settings before transcription service initialized
  - Fixed script detection not running when path was already configured
  - Fixed transcription commands disappearing after plugin reload

  #### Installation

 #####  For New Users

  1. Install the plugin
  2. Wait for the setup notice (appears after 2 seconds)
  3. Click "Install Now" and choose "One-Click Install"
  4. Scripts download and install automatically
  5. Start transcribing. 

#####  For Existing Users

  - Transcription commands now appear automatically if scripts are detected
  - If you already have scripts installed, everything works as before
  - If commands are missing, use "Install Transcription Scripts" from command palette

 ### Documentation

  Updated README with comprehensive transcription setup guide including:
  - First-time setup walkthrough
  - Manual installation instructions
  - System requirements
  - Available commands
  - Model selection guide

  #### Notes

  This release focuses on making local transcription setup as smooth as possible for new users while maintaining full
  compatibility with existing setups. The one-click installer eliminates the manual download/extract process that was previously
   required.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Mobile share menu integration with share sheet for quick access to saving tiktoks

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# New Features

## Local Transcription Support (Desktop Only)

  - Added local speech-to-text transcription using faster-whisper
  - Requires Python 3, yt-dlp, and ffmpeg
  - Works offline with no API keys or third-party services
  - Five model options (tiny, base, small, medium, large) with trade-offs between speed and quality

## Smart Dependency Checker

  - New dependency checker tool in settings to verify Python, yt-dlp, and ffmpeg installation
  - Provides platform-specific installation commands (macOS, Windows, Linux)
  - Copy-to-clipboard functionality for easy terminal setup
  - Visual status indicators for each dependency

## Mobile Compatibility

  - Transcription features automatically hidden on mobile devices
  - Mobile users can still create and manage TikTok notes normally
  - Clear messaging that transcription is available on desktop from v1.5.0 onwards

# Improvements

## Transcription UX

  - Completion notifications for finished transcriptions (configurable in settings)
  - Cleaner transcription modal interface
  - Bulk processing now defaults to transcription enabled
  - Improved modal minimize behavior with backdrop click support

## Settings Organization

  - Platform-aware settings UI (hides transcription options on mobile)
  - Better organized transcription settings with setup guidance
  - Added toggle for completion notifications

## Technical Changes

  - Separated transcription logic into dedicated module for better maintainability
  - Enhanced modal system with mobile platform detection
  - Improved error handling and user feedback during transcription

  ---
  Note: If you're upgrading from an earlier version and want to use local transcription, you'll need to install the required
  dependencies (Python 3, yt-dlp, ffmpeg). Use the new dependency checker in settings for installation instructions.

releases.author: ameyxd
releases.description:
- Fixed date timezone issue - dates now use current timezone instead of UTC
  - Removed hashtags from note titles and filenames for cleaner organization
  - Improved mobile TikTok /t/ URL processing

  ## Changes
  - Mobile /t/ URLs now work correctly and generate proper video IDs
  - All dates (created, posted) respect user's local timezone
  - Hashtag content is removed from titles but preserved in hashtag metadata
releases.name: Fix mobile parsing, date formats and title descriptions

releases.author: ameyxd
releases.description:
## What's New in v1.3.0

### ObsidianReviewBot Compliance
- Fixed all security and compliance issues for Obsidian Community store
- Replaced innerHTML usage with safe DOM API methods
- Updated file deletion to use proper Obsidian APIs

### Mobile Improvements  
- Enhanced mobile URL expansion for /t/ format TikTok URLs
- Improved mobile compatibility and error handling

### UI/UX Enhancements
- Moved inline styles to CSS framework for better theme compatibility
- Added debug mode toggle to control verbose logging in production
- Improved code consistency across all features

### Technical Improvements
- Clean TypeScript compilation with proper type definitions
- Consistent error handling and logging patterns
- Enhanced transcription feature stability
releases.name: Release 1.3.0

releases.author: ameyxd
releases.description:
# TikToker v1.2.0

## 🚀 New Features
- **Mobile-first TikTok processing** with improved compatibility
- **Bulk processing** for multiple TikTok URLs at once
- **Advanced slideshow detection** and handling
- **Private video handling** with configurable options
- **Dual embed fallback** system for maximum compatibility

## 🔧 Improvements  
- Better TikTok video date parsing using bit manipulation
- Enhanced duplicate file handling in bulk operations
- Improved hashtag deduplication
- Mobile-optimized network requests
- Better error handling and user feedback

## 📱 Mobile Support
- Optimized for Obsidian mobile app
- CORS-friendly request handling
- Mobile-specific embed generation

## 🔗 BRAT Installation
Use this repository URL with BRAT: `ameyxd/obsidian-tiktoker`


This is the current stable release with all TikTok processing features working correctly.
releases.name: TikToker v1.2.0 - Enhanced Mobile & Bulk Processing
